ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach for the team */,
  "team_location" TEXT /* Location or city where the team is based */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that played in the match */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date on which the match took place */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match (Win, Loss, Draw) */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points earned in the match */,
  "nrr" REAL /* Net run rate achieved in the match */,
  "venue" TEXT /* The name or location of the venue where the match took place */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., League, Knockout, Friendly) */,
  "innings_1_score" INTEGER /* Score of the first innings */,
  "innings_2_score" INTEGER /* Score of the second innings */,
  "match_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the match (e.g., 50 overs, T20) */,
  "umpire_1" TEXT /* Name of the first umpire */,
  "umpire_2" TEXT /* Name of the second umpire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of experience the coach has */,
  "coach_nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the coach */,
  "coach_email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "coach_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the coach */,
  "coach_description" TEXT /* A brief description or biography of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standing record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Total matches played by the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Total wins by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Total losses by the team */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the team */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Total number of draws by the team */,
  "nrr" REAL /* Net run rate of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID to track the season for which the standings are recorded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the standings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, management) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Access level of the user (e.g., 1 for basic, 2 for advanced) */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
